docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Hi there! I'm Frank (Also known as FZ3)

  • 📍 Located in Mexico
  • ⌚️ Watchfaces designer for Amazfit watches
  • 🎨 Graphic designer for The XPerience Project
  • 📱 Devices I own: Poco X5 Pro (redwood), OnePlus Nord 5 (lexus), Amazfit Bip 6, Amazfit Active Max

docs.title: Where to buy my Premium Watchfaces
docs.text: You can grab any of them in my Buy Me A Coffee Store

docs.title: Want to support me?
docs.text:
First things first... Thank you so much! ❤️ You can use any of the following ways to support me

  • PayPal
  • Buy Me A Coffee
